descriptionZh: 电磁激振式物料均匀输送设备，处理能力5-230 m³/h。无需润滑，功耗低(0.15-1.5kW)，振动频率50Hz，结构简单可靠。提供300-800mm宽度选择，适用于多种散状物料的精确给料。
descriptionEn: Electromagnetic vibration material transport equipment with 5-230 m³/h capacity. No lubrication required, low power consumption (0.15-1.5kW), 50Hz vibration frequency, simple reliable structure. Width options from 300-800mm, suitable for precise feeding of various bulk materials.

features.descriptionZh: 仅含电磁激振器和弹簧系统，无旋转部件，维护简单
features.descriptionEn: Only electromagnetic exciter and spring system, no rotating parts, simple maintenance

features.descriptionZh: 功率低至0.15kW，相比机械给料机节能50%以上
features.descriptionEn: Power as low as 0.15kW, over 50% energy saving compared to mechanical feeders

features.descriptionZh: 电流调节系统可实现0-100%给料量无级调节，响应迅速
features.descriptionEn: Current regulation system enables 0-100% stepless feed rate adjustment with quick response

features.descriptionZh: 槽体倾角可达15°，特殊纵向振动模式防止物料堵塞
features.descriptionEn: Trough inclination up to 15°, special longitudinal vibration pattern prevents material clogging

features.descriptionZh: 处理粒度0.1-60mm物料，适应不同工况，提供多种型号选择
features.descriptionEn: Processes materials with particle size 0.1-60mm, adaptable to different conditions, various models available

description.zh: 连接破碎与筛分工序，精确控制下游设备给料量。振动强度可调，最大处理能力230 m³/h，适用于0.1-60mm细碎矿石。
description.en: Connects crushing and screening processes with precise control of feed rate to downstream equipment. Adjustable vibration intensity, maximum processing capacity 230 m³/h, suitable for 0.1-60mm fine crushed ore.

description.zh: 向高温冶炼设备均匀给料。振动小(5-30mm振幅)，稳定性高，电磁线圈绝缘等级F级，确保物料供应连续稳定。
description.en: Uniformly feeds materials to high-temperature smelting equipment. Small vibration (5-30mm amplitude), high stability, Class F insulation electromagnetic coil ensures continuous stable material supply.

description.zh: 用于水泥、石灰、石膏生产的原料精确供给。控制系统精度高达±1%，根据生产需求实时调整给料量，设备宽度300-800mm可选。
description.en: Used for precise supply of raw materials in cement, lime and gypsum production. Control system accuracy up to ±1%, real-time feed rate adjustment based on production requirements, available width 300-800mm.

description.zh: 实现细粒物料定量给料，频率50Hz的高频振动有效防止细粉结块和架桥，功率0.15-1.5kW满足不同产量需求。
description.en: Achieves quantitative feeding of fine materials, 50Hz high-frequency vibration effectively prevents fine powder agglomeration and bridging, power 0.15-1.5kW meets different production capacity requirements.
